summary_one_sentence: In this 2D cartoon artillery game, the player drags and releases various units to launch unique projectiles at an enemy castle while defending their own destructible base from automated counter-attacks.
core_loop: Select a unit from the bottom character selection panel.
Drag and release to aim and fire the unit's unique projectiles at the enemy castle.
Deal damage to the enemy castle's health and destructible environment.
Survive automated incoming projectile attacks from the enemy castle.
win_condition: Reduce the enemy (red) castle's health to 0%.
loss_condition: The player's (blue) castle's health is reduced to 0%.
hud: Health bars (Top left and top right)
open_questions: Are there other unit types available to unlock or select?
Does the player have any defensive abilities, or is it purely a damage race?
How is the enemy auto-attack rate or damage determined?
